_doc: Per-source / per-pattern tag overrides applied by auto_tagger.py AFTER the regex tagging pass. Each rule's `if_*` conditions all have to match (AND); `force_add_tags` and `force_remove_tags` then modify the resulting tags. Edit this file when a scraper is consistently mis-tagging events the same way — it's the events-side equivalent of the per-venue pill_in override system in index.html.

rules.name: human-readable label for this rule (required, helps debug)
rules.if_source_regex: regex against event.source (optional, takes precedence over if_source)
force_add_tags: list of tag names to add
force_remove_tags: list of tag names to remove
